div.head: 149. Memorandum for the RecordSource: Johnson Library, National Security File, Country File, Vietnam, Vietnam Policy File—Cables. Top Secret.
div.p:
In the NSC meeting on February 18, 1965,See Document 140. the President gave approval to the line of policy outlined in London 5147 to Ambassador Bruce dated February 16,Document 131. with the following exceptions: 1.
The President made no decision with respect to any call for a meeting of the UN Security Council or other discussion in the Security Council. 2.
The President made no decision with respect to the means or frequency of reports on U.S. military action. 3.
The President made no decision within the meeting with respect to the timing of the next military action.
A copy of telegram 5147 to London is attached as a document of reference. The President read from the document, with the exceptions noted, in presenting this matter to the Council.
